_provenance: Hand-derived from U-transform formula (W = max(WEALTH_ARG_FLOOR, 1+r/RETURN_PCT_TO_FRACTION), U = compute_crra_utility(W, gamma=2.0)) applied to fixed raw-percent return series, then compute_crra_eu_tstat(U_series). The 'wrong' values document what the buggy implementation (raw pct passed directly to compute_crra_eu_tstat, or hardcoded compute_sortino_tstat ignoring tstat_fn) produces. No SUT output pinned — all values derivable by closed-form arithmetic.
_audit_finding: H-1: _haircut_select hardcodes compute_sortino_tstat(series, seed=trial_idx) at autotuner.py:1251 and never calls tstat_fn. CRRA-EU bundles get their haircut scored by the Sortino t-stat instead of the U-transformed CRRA-EU t-stat. The fix must: (1) call tstat_fn instead of the hardcoded compute_sortino_tstat, and (2) U-transform daily_returns before calling compute_crra_eu_tstat (CRRA-001 contract, test_audit_fix_crra_neff_arch.py).
_contract_ref: autotuner.py:1855-1859 — daily_returns stored as raw PERCENT values (e.g. 5.0 for 5%). The CRRA branch must U-transform via max(WEALTH_ARG_FLOOR, 1+r/RETURN_PCT_TO_FRACTION) -> compute_crra_utility(W, gamma) before calling compute_crra_eu_tstat. The Sortino branch calls compute_sortino_tstat(series, seed=trial_idx) directly (no U-transform).

scenario_1_single_all_positive_trial._description: Single trial with all-positive raw-PERCENT daily_returns (T=30, values like 5.0 for 5%). After U-transform, compute_crra_eu_tstat returns ~19.91. The hardcoded compute_sortino_tstat returns 0.0 (conservative fallback: all bootstrap resamples hit SORTINO_SENTINEL for an all-positive series). So: with correct CRRA tstat_fn dispatch + U-transform -> trial passes gate. Bug (hardcoded Sortino) -> trial fails gate.

with_crra_eu_tstat_fn_u_transformed._note: Correct: U-transformed series passed to compute_crra_eu_tstat. p_adj ~1.5e-5 << q=0.05.

with_crra_eu_tstat_fn_wrong_raw._note: WRONG path: raw pct values passed directly to compute_crra_eu_tstat without U-transform. Differs from correct value (~19.91 vs ~19.04). This is the CRRA-001 bug separate from H-1.

with_sortino_hardcoded_bug._note: H-1 bug: hardcoded compute_sortino_tstat always produces 0.0 for all-positive series (SE unavailable). Same result regardless of what tstat_fn was passed.

scenario_2_two_trial_winner_discriminato._description: Two trials. Trial 0: tail-heavy (from crra_haircut_u_transform_contract.json scenario_contract). Trial 1: all-positive 8-obs percent series. With CRRA tstat_fn + U-transform: trial 1 wins (high positive t), trial 0 fails gate (negative t). With hardcoded Sortino: neither trial clears gate. Discriminating: gate outcome differs (crra_clears=True, sortino_clears=False).

with_crra_eu_tstat_fn_u_transformed._note: CRRA tstat_fn + U-transform: trial 1 wins (high positive t=9.22). Trial 0 has negative t (-1.13), fails gate.

with_sortino_hardcoded_bug_seeds_0_and_1._note: H-1 bug: hardcoded Sortino. Trial 1 is all-positive => Sortino tstat=0.0. Neither clears gate. Also what happens if tstat_fn is ignored regardless of what was passed.
